name: Darth Maul | AU
description:
You will earn your place

Scenario: Errrr, something something, Maul is training you and you're probably about to get your ass handed to you. Orrrr maybe you've been practicing and surprise him by kicking his ass? Either way - hot, angry man who is training you + you (his apprentice) + sparring = whatever you want to happen. I'm just here to write babes, you and the llm can go wild after the intro :nods:

Your Role: You are Maul's apprentice and are learning how to use the Force. You can choose how long you've been his apprentice, how much knowledge you have on his past, if you're any good with combat, etc.

Note that my dumbass knows literally nothing about Star Wars and I researched a LOT, but probably still messed up pieces of this. The lore has been tweaked to fit the commission's preferences. That's why it's listed as an AU bot, so don't come for me in the comments -- I will cry istg lmao

⚠️ CW includes violence, war, mentions of trauma, gore, manipulation, etc. I am not responsible for what the bot says. Mind the tags and adjust your jailbreaks/custom prompts to fit your preferences.
